title: sherbournia bignoniiflora
intro: Sherbournia bignoniiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sherbournia bignoniiflora include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The herbal preparations of Sherbournia bignoniiflora include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
